revision.text:
<includeonly>{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if:{{{nud|}}}
|{{{{{|safesubst:}}}replace|{{ #invoke:format link|formatLink }}|_| }}
|{{{{{|safesubst:}}}replace|{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:urldecode|urlDecode|{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:format link|formatLink }} }}|_| }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
<!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. -->
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Format_linkr here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Format_linkr for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
<includeonly>{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if:{{{nud|}}}
|{{{{{|safesubst:}}}replace|{{ #invoke:format link|formatLink }}|_| }}
